title: High Missingness in Fielder Data
explanation: The fielder data shows a high level of missingness (96.4%). This could be due to incorrect data collection or incomplete data entry.
recommendation: Verify the accuracy of the fielder data by cross-checking with other sources and ensure that it is properly cleaned and preprocessed before analysis.

title: Outlier-Heavy Metric total_runs
explanation: The total_runs metric shows a high level of outliers (17.1%). This could indicate that the data is not normally distributed or that there are unusual patterns in the data.
recommendation: Visualize the distribution of total_runs to better understand the pattern and consider using robust statistical methods to analyze the data.

title: Strong Relationship between batsman_runs and total_runs
explanation: The correlation analysis shows a strong positive relationship (corr=0.98) between batsman_runs and total_runs.
recommendation: Consider using this relationship to improve predictive models or identify patterns in the data.
